member.name: T:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559
member.summary: The ethereum transaction data, in the format defined in EIP-1559

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.MaxPriorityGas
member.summary: An 'optional' additional fee in Ethereum that is paid directly to miners in order to incentivize them to include your transaction in a block. Not used in Hedera

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.MaxGas
member.summary: The maximum amount, in tinybars, that the payer of the hedera transaction is willing to pay to complete the transaction

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.GasLimit
member.summary: The amount of gas available for the transaction

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.AccessList
member.summary: specifies an array of addresses and storage keys that the transaction plans to access

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.RecoveryId
member.summary: recovery parameter used to ease the signature verification

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.R
member.summary: The R value of the signature

member.name: F:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.S
member.summary: The S value of the signature

member.name: M:EthereumTransactionDataEip1559.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to an ethereum transaction data.
